findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).

findings.message: 'alert-dialog-trigger' contains no 'button' to carry the required content.
findings.rationale: The trigger button must present its label as its own text. Assistive technology reads the control's accessible name from the element itself, and protocol projections lift a trigger label from the label-bearing component's direct text — a label nested in a child (e.g. a badge) or absent entirely produces a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.
